name: First Federal Community Bank Of Bucyrus
description_short: First Federal Community Bank of Bucyrus is an FDIC-insured community bank offering checking, savings, CDs, debit cards, and business lending with a focus on local community partnerships.
description_long:
First Federal Community Bank of Bucyrus (FFCB) is a community-focused bank that serves personal and business customers through its website at ffcb.com. The bank emphasizes its commitment to the local Crawford County community through sponsorships, partnerships with local organizations, and community storytelling initiatives.

The bank offers a range of personal banking products including five unique checking and savings account options, Certificates of Deposit (currently promoting a 20-Month Premium CD at 3.92% APY), mobile and online banking, Zelle money transfer integration, debit cards, bill pay services, and community rewards programs. For business customers, FFCB provides tailored financial solutions and business lending support. All deposits are FDIC-insured and backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government.

FFCB distinguishes itself through deep community involvement, including partnerships with Crawford County Now for historical preservation and storytelling, active support of local nonprofits, and Community First initiatives highlighting local heroes and small businesses. The bank also offers Card Connect, a mobile app that allows customers to set transaction alerts and control when, where, and how their cards are used for enhanced fraud protection.

As a community bank, FFCB is best suited for customers seeking personalized service and wanting to support local institutions. However, the website content does not provide detailed information about competitive rates across all products, minimum balance requirements, or comprehensive fee structures, which are important factors for consumers comparing banking options. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Fraud prevention and Card Connect mobile app
Business lending and tailored financial solutions
Community rewards program (Premier and Advantage accounts)
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Competitive CD rates: 20-Month Premium CD at 3.92% APY (as of promotional period)
Five unique account options for checking and savings to fit different lifestyles
Mobile banking app (FFCB Mobile) for convenient account management
Zelle integration for fast, safe money transfers to people you know
Card Connect app with customizable transaction alerts and card usage controls
No annual fee on debit cards and no fee for ATM use at FFCB locations
Community rewards program for Premier and Advantage Checking account holders
Active community partnership and sponsorship involvement in Crawford County
cons: Limited geographic footprint as a community bank (appears to serve primarily Crawford County area)
Debit card daily limits are restrictive: $500 for cash withdrawal and $1,000 for point-of-sale purchases
$2.00 fee charged for using non-FFCB ATMs, plus potential other usage fees
Website lacks detailed fee schedule, minimum balance requirements, and comprehensive rate information for all products
No information provided about business loan terms, small business account options, or commercial lending rates
best_for: Crawford County residents and local business owners seeking personalized community bank services
Savers interested in CD products with competitive rates and FDIC protection
Customers prioritizing fraud prevention through advanced card monitoring tools
Small business owners looking for relationship-based lending and local financial partnership
diagnosis: First Federal Community Bank is best for Crawford County residents and local business owners who value community ties and personalized banking relationships over online-only convenience or specialized financial products. The main caveat is that as a regional community bank, it may lack the product breadth, competitive rates, or technological innovation of larger national banks or digital-first financial institutions.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
